public_menu.rationale: Food delivery needs a clean, appetizing base (off-whites, soft shadows) to let high-quality food photography and the restaurant's custom brand colors shine.

admin_dashboard.rationale: KPI-first control panel. Emphasizes simplicity, data density, operational alerting, and fast action.

typography.anti_default_rules: Avoid Inter for public headings. Optimize for appetite appeal and clarity.

restaurant_custom_variables.usage: Use primary for CTAs, active states, cart button, and active chips. Secondary for soft backgrounds like unselected chips or highlights.

public_menu_mobile_first.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto bg-[#FAFAFA] min-h-screen relative pb-24 shadow-2xl
public_menu_mobile_first.header: relative w-full h-48 md:h-56 rounded-b-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm
public_menu_mobile_first.category_chips: flex overflow-x-auto gap-3 py-4 px-4 scrollbar-hide snap-x
public_menu_mobile_first.cart_bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 w-full max-w-md mx-auto p-4 bg-white border-t border-gray-100 shadow-[0_-8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] z-50 rounded-t-2xl
public_menu_mobile_first.spacing_scale: Use p-4 for standard container edges, gap-4 for list items. Generous whitespace around food images.

admin_dashboard.layout: Grid-based control panel. Left sidebar (w-64) + main content area.
admin_dashboard.kpi_strip: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8
admin_dashboard.tables: Dense layout, p-3 cell padding, border-collapse.
admin_dashboard.surface_styles: Neumorphism mix: Flat white background for cards with 1px border and very soft shadow-sm.

components_guidelines.public_header: Includes cover image background (object-cover, 80% opacity overlay gradient). Floating white card overlay at bottom of header containing Restaurant Logo, Name, and Open/Closed status.
components_guidelines.category_chip: Rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer. Active: bg-[var(--brand-primary)] text-white. Inactive: bg-white text-gray-600 border border-gray-200.
components_guidelines.product_card: Horizontal layout for list: Image (w-28 h-28 rounded-xl object-cover) on left, info (title, trunc desc, price) on right. Minimalist, no heavy shadows, just 1px border or subtle bg-white. Entire card is clickable.
components_guidelines.product_modal: Drawer/BottomSheet style on mobile. Large hero image at top. Sections for Add-ons (Adicionais) separated by gray dividers. Add-on groups must clearly show 'Escolha 1' (Radio) or 'Até X opções' (Checkbox).
components_guidelines.whatsapp_checkout: Clear summary list. 'Enviar Pedido' CTA button using WhatsApp green (#25D366) or Brand Primary. Includes delivery fee, subtotal, total.
components_guidelines.admin_status_badge: Rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider. Colored based on order_status palette.
components_guidelines.shadcn_usage: Admin uses standard Shadcn (Tables, Dialogs, Select, Tabs). Public app uses pure HTML/Tailwind for layout structural freedom, but Shadcn Drawers/Dialogs for product modals.
components_guidelines.icons: lucide-react for Admin. @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone) for Public menu.

public_menu.buttons: Active scale down (active:scale-95) for tactile feel.
public_menu.modals: Slide up from bottom (Drawer style) for product details to keep one-handed thumb reachability.

admin.transitions: Fast (150ms) ease-in-out for tabs and dropdowns.

restaurant_cover_placeholder.description: Warm cafe interior, to be used as default cover image for restaurant.

media_and_images.guidelines: Never use dummyimage or placehold.it. Use these URLs strictly for seed data or UI prototyping. Ensure object-cover and max-h logic applies to prevent layout shifting.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure var(--brand-primary) and var(--brand-primary-foreground) meet 4.5:1 contrast. Use black text if primary is a light color.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='category-chip-burgers', data-testid='add-to-cart-btn', data-testid='order-status-select'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the public app layout mobile-first using max-w-md mx-auto container wrapping to simulate a mobile app on desktop browsers.
Implement CSS variables in globals.css for --brand-primary and --brand-secondary. The public UI must consume these.
The Cart component on the public side must be a fixed bottom bar that appears when items are in the cart.
Product variations/addons should be handled via a bottom drawer/modal overlay (Shadcn Drawer works great here).
Admin panel must be a separate route (e.g., /admin) with a standard sidebar+topbar layout.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for public headings. Use 'Outfit' or fallback to a clean sans-serif like Manrope.
Use Phosphor icons for the consumer side to give a premium feel, Lucide for the admin side.
Adhere strictly to data-testid requirements for ALL buttons, inputs, chips, and cards.
